salientSummary: ToastCenter + ProgressCenter @Observable models, ToastHostView overlayed at bottom of RootView, ToolbarProgressIndicator in .status toolbar slot. Monotonic-tick auto-dismiss for success toasts (5s), sticky error toasts with click-to-expand stderr detail, max 3 visible successes. 13 ViewModel tests + 7 snapshot tests (all md5-distinct across light+dark) green. 182 Swift Testing + 38 XCTest = 220 total tests (was ~201 baseline; +13 ViewModel +7 snapshot). VAL-UI-004, VAL-UI-005, VAL-UI-006 fulfilled.
whatWasImplemented: Added Sources/ViewModels/ToastCenter.swift (@Observable @MainActor with toasts: [Toast], success/error/dismiss methods; monotonic autoDismissTicks dict per toast id + tickCounter makes auto-dismiss race-free under rapid re-triggers; enforceSuccessCap() evicts oldest success when count > 3 but never touches errors; newest toast inserts at index 0 so bottom-aligned overlay shows latest on the bottom). Toast struct carries id/kind/message/detail/createdAt; Kind is .success or .error. Added Sources/ViewModels/ProgressCenter.swift (@Observable @MainActor active: [ProgressItem], begin/update/end/isActive). Added Sources/Views/Toasts/ToastHostView.swift (bottom-aligned VStack ForEach over center.toasts with move+opacity transition; each ToastRow styled with green/red 18%-tint fill + 45% stroke + 10pt corner radius + drop shadow, SF Symbol checkmark.circle.fill / exclamationmark.triangle.fill, x button on error only, tap-to-expand detail for error toasts with detail, monospaced ScrollView capped at 200pt). Added Sources/Views/Toasts/ToolbarProgressIndicator.swift (ProgressCenter environment observer; linear determinate bar 90pt wide when percent set; circular spinner otherwise; zero-width Color.clear when idle so toolbar layout doesn't jitter). Wired via .environment(ToastCenter.self)/(ProgressCenter.self) in KiteApp.swift for WindowGroup + Settings scene; RootView.swift adds .toolbar { ToolbarItem(.status) { ToolbarProgressIndicator() } } and .overlay(alignment: .bottom) { ToastHostView() }. Tests: Tests/KiteTests/ViewModelTests/ToastCenterTests.swift (7 cases — appears, auto-dismiss 5.5s, sticky 6s, dismiss, cap-evicts-oldest-success, errors-don't-count-against-cap, detail-preserved). Tests/KiteTests/ViewModelTests/ProgressCenterTests.swift (6 cases — begin, update, end, multiple concurrent, end-unknown-is-safe, zero-and-hundred). Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/ToastRowSnapshotTests.swift (4 cases — Success.light, ErrorCollapsed.light, ErrorExpanded.light via ExpandedToastRow helper, ErrorCollapsed.dark — all md5-distinct). Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/ToolbarProgressIndicatorSnapshotTests.swift (3 cases — Idle.light, Indeterminate.light, Determinate.light — all md5-distinct). Tests/KiteUITests/ToastsUITests.swift smoke-only: asserts Toast.Host accessibility identifier present; real click-to-expand XCUITest skipped with XCTSkip until M5-fetch provides a production trigger path.
whatWasLeftUndone: XCUITest click-to-expand detail case (VAL-UI-005 full behavior verification) intentionally deferred — no production trigger exists until M5-fetch / M5-pull-push surface real auth-error toasts. The XCUITest stub is committed with XCTSkip so the next feature can replace the skip with a real assertion. XCUITests authored but not executed here (AGENTS.md defers KiteUITests execution pending TCC permissions). Manual launch verification skipped — no display harness in this environment; declaring this as not-performed rather than claiming pass.

commandsRun.observation: project regenerated with new Sources/ViewModels/{ToastCenter,ProgressCenter}.swift, Sources/Views/Toasts/**, and Tests/KiteTests/{ViewModelTests,ViewTests}/*{Toast,Progress}*
182 Swift Testing + 38 XCTest = 220 total passed; +13 ViewModel (7 ToastCenter + 6 ProgressCenter) and +7 snapshot (4 ToastRow + 3 ToolbarProgressIndicator) vs. baseline
7 unique md5s across 7 snapshot PNGs — no byte-identical degenerate false-greens

interactiveChecks.action: No manual app launch performed — this worker had no display harness available for end-to-end GUI verification of the overlay and toolbar placement. Rendering paths are covered by ToastRowSnapshotTests at row granularity + ToolbarProgressIndicatorSnapshotTests at widget granularity + ToastCenterTests/ProgressCenterTests at model granularity. The next host with a display should launch the built app and confirm the overlay is clickable, the toolbar slot renders, and the accessibility tree exposes Toast.Host as asserted by the smoke XCUITest.
interactiveChecks.observed: N/A — declared not-performed per swiftui-worker SKILL.md step 8 rule

discoveredIssues.description: M5-fetch and M5-pull-push should replace the XCTSkip'd ToastsUITests.testErrorToastClickExpandsDetail_deferredUntilRealTriggerLands with a real trigger-based assertion once they surface real auth errors. The infrastructure (Toast.DismissButton / Toast.Detail identifiers) is already in place to write the assertion without further model changes.
